transcript: Speaker A: Myself Trisha. Speaker B: Hi Trisha, I'm Dhanush and I'm from Telangana. What about you? Speaker A: Hello, I'm Trisha, coming from Kanchipuram. I work in sales. You also here to learn English? Speaker B: Yes Trisha, I started practicing 20 days ago. And you? Speaker A: Hey, I'm Trisha. Though I'm originally from Kanchipuram, I'm working in field sales in Chennai. So, how long have you been using MySivi? Speaker C: Hi madam, I'm Rajan. Just now installed this application. Speaker A: Don't worry Rajan, you'll definitely get good at English. Keep practicing daily, okay? So where's your hometown? Speaker A: English pesa partners venuma? MySivi la 50 latcham co-learners English kathukittu irukanga. Ivanga ellarum romba supportive. So ivanga kooda pesi neenga confident-ah English pesa aarambikalam. Readya? Ippove MySivi-ya install panni English pesa aarambinga. [Do you need partners to speak English? Over 50 lakh co-learners are learning English on MySivi. They are all very supportive. So you can speak with them and start speaking English confidently. Ready? Install MySivi now and start speaking English.]
on_screen_text: Day:01 Progress: 22%, Trisha, Co-Learners, Day:07 Progress: 54%, Day:15 Progress: 87%, MySivi, 50 LAKHS [50 Lakhs]
summary: The ad showcases a woman's 15-day progress in speaking English fluently using the MySivi app. It highlights the platform's community of 50 lakh supportive co-learners. The call to action encourages viewers to download MySivi to practice and speak English confidently.
